prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild training yard with warm wood tones. Kiri Moonvale, a masculine ranger in a green half-cape with a compact bow case and leaf-shaped brooch, catches Kiri Starling, a feminine healer in cream and mint robes with a satchel of vials, by the forearm as she stumbles during a training drill. Safe, supportive, cinematic motion, no injury, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous training yard shot. Kiri Starling regains her balance, standing upright while smiling softly at Kiri Moonvale. Kiri Moonvale gently releases his supportive forearm hold on her. Both characters remain in their positions, cooperative recovery, warm lighting, cinematic anime style, no text, no watermark.
